name: Cat Jumper
short_description: Challenge your memory and precision in this platformer where a cat leaps to escape the lurking shark.
detailed_description:
"Watch every step—one mistake could send you back to the start!"

About This Game

The world is drowning in a great flood, and alone cat must rely on expert jumping skills to survive. But escape won’t be easy… When a shark breaks free from its aquarium and marks the cat as prey, every missed jump plunges you into the water—where the shark drags you back to the starting point.

This game challenges your memory, distance calculation, and quick thinking. Even with checkpoints, progress won’t come easily. You are the brave cat who must leap, endure, and prove that small efforts can overcome great obstacles! 🐱🌊🦈

Key Features

  • 🐾 Play as a brave cat surviving the flood

  • 🌊 Precise jump mechanics requiring distance calculation

  • 🦈 Sharks that drag you back to the start when you fail

  • 🎯 Challenges combining memory and quick reflexes

  • 🔄 Checkpoints that won’t make things easier
